description: Search test queries for Kingston Care Connect - Golden set with expected results + sampled coverage

goldenSet.description: Hand-curated queries with specific expected service matches. Use for regression testing and search quality evaluation.

queries.notes: Crisis detection should trigger. Results must include crisis lines.
Domestic violence - should surface women's shelters and crisis lines
Sexual assault crisis - SACK must be top result
Informal food need - synonym expansion should help
Emergency shelter need - ICH ideally but any shelter acceptable
Informal shelter need - any shelter service acceptable
General mental health search - any mental health provider acceptable

queries.query: feeling depressed need someone to talk to

queries.notes: Youth mental health - ideally Maltby but any mental health provider acceptable
Trans healthcare - KCHC programs ideally, but any health provider acceptable. NOTE: Search gap - trans program not well indexed
Indigenous health - either IIPCT or KFLA Indigenous team acceptable
Indigenous mental health - either Hope for Wellness ID acceptable
Legal aid search - any legal aid provider acceptable
Library search - KNOWN GAP: KFPL not indexed with 'library' keyword. Accepting community centre as fallback.

sampledCoverage.description: Broader coverage with 1-2 queries per sub-category. Use for search breadth evaluation.

queries.query: I dont know what to do anymore
street health wound care no ID
kicked out of house nowhere to go
just got out of jail need help
my child came out as trans support
homeless in winter need warm place
